96392.title: American actor Brad Renfro dies at age 25
96392.extract:
Wednesday, January 16, 2008
 
Brad Renfro, an American film actor, has died at age 25. Renfro, who had a history of substance abuse, was found dead yesterday morning in his Los Angeles home by paramedics who had been summoned to the scene. The cause of death has not yet been determined, but officials said an autopsy could be conducted as early as today.


Sources
Associated Press. Actor Brad Renfro found dead in Los Angeles home — CNN, January 15, 2008
 Brad Renfro dies — TMZ.com, January 15, 2008
